## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, website issues, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pixis website experienced two attacks, causing downtime and SEO impacts; internal IT team has taken over website DevOps](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [New Looker performance report set up for Pixis, showing real-time SEO metrics from Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [GrowthX added Jacob as a new managing director with strong SEO background from G2](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Discussion on AEO (AI Engine Optimization) trends and potential tools like triprofound.com for tracking AI search performance](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

## Topics

### Website Security and SEO Impact

  - [Pixis website suffered two attacks, causing downtime and SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Google indexed fake metadata, impacting search results](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Internal IT team now managing website DevOps for improved security](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Evan is working on re-indexing content and cleaning up old, underperforming blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### SEO Performance Tracking

  - [New Looker report set up for Pixis, showing real-time Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Report currently grouped by custom weeks; will be adjusted to natural weeks](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Once connected to GA4, report will include LLM referral traffic (e.g., perplexity.ai, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Some keywords showing strong performance: "LLM for marketing" (20 searches/month, 55% CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [GrowthX team updating meta titles and slugs for better SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [74 articles in "considering" phase for future content](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Discussion on rewriting old blog content to improve SEO fundamentals](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Glossary pages to be published gradually (10-15 per week) to avoid alarming Google](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

### AI and AEO (AI Engine Optimization)

  - [Exploration of triprofound.com as a potential tool for tracking AI search performance](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Discussion on the changing landscape of account-based marketing and the need for unified tools](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Consideration of building in-house AEO tracking capabilities for GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

### Team Updates and Collaboration

  - [New GrowthX managing director (Jacob) joined with strong SEO background from G2](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Ongoing challenges with accessing and editing design templates in Figma](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Decision to set up a Canva account for Pixis to streamline design collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to update Looker report to use natural weeks instead of custom weeks](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Evan to send links of old blog posts for potential rewriting/optimization](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Evan to set up Canva account for Pixis and share access with Aida](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [GrowthX team to explore building in-house AEO tracking capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Aida to gradually publish glossary pages (10-15 per week)](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Evan to follow up on getting editable design templates for featured images](https://fathom.video/share/tJkQAwTRPtKRG2cSzzA-ymRp3hJUDzus?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
